src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/clien.general_idea: Replace multiple @RequestParam annotations with a single @SpringQueryMap object to simplify method signatures and centralize request parameter handling.
Add consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to @GetMapping to explicitly define the expected media type for the request.

Replace individual @RequestParam annotations with a single @SpringQueryMap object to encapsulate query parameters.
Explicitly specify the consumed media type for the endpoint using Spring's MediaType constant.
Changed the base API endpoint from query.cgi to entry.cgi to align with DSM API standards.
Replaced individual @RequestParam annotations with a single @SpringQueryMap object to handle request parameters.
Added consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to specify the expected content type for requests.
Added a new method to retrieve the list of surveillance cameras.
Added a new method to retrieve detailed information about surveillance cameras.
Added a new method to capture a snapshot from a surveillance camera, returning raw bytes.
Added produces = MediaType.IMAGE_JPEG_VALUE to specify the response content type for the snapshot method.
Removed the unused import for DsmApiClientConfiguration as it is no longer referenced in the interface definition directly (likely moved to config class or implicit).
